CustomField.description: Student Enrollment Threshold Met Date from the school object associated to the account. Used in the Funnel Stage flow/automation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When the school added 90% of their students (active student count > 90% of enrolled students/current enrollment number), thus the Completing Student Setup criteria was met. Date field must be populated to move to the next funnel stage (Logging Actions).
CustomField.label: Student Enrollment Threshold Met Date
